definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">Ranges</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">entity_tp_range</field><field name="comment">Max Range of Entity Teleporter</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Entity Teleporter Range</field><field name="value">450</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">item_tp_range</field><field name="comment">Max Range of Item Teleporter</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">Item Teleporter Range</field><field name="value">500</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
